birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: The crested coua (Coua cristata) is a common medium-sized bird member of the cuckoo family, Cuculidae. It is endemic to Madagascar, mainly found in the coastal regions of the island. The crested coua is a weak flyer, so it will often be observed hopping from branch to branch in high canopies.{{Cite journal|last1=URANO|first1=EIICHIRO|last2=YAMAGISHI|first2=SATOSHI|last3=ANDRIANARIMISA|first3=ARISTIDE|last4=ANDRIATSARAFARA|first4=SOLOFO|date=2008-04-03|title=Different habitat use among three sympatric species of couas Coua cristata, C

links.label: 分布于
links.evidence: The crested coua (Coua cristata) is a common medium-sized bird member of the cuckoo family, Cuculidae. It is endemic to Madagascar, mainly found in the coastal regions of the island. The crested coua is a weak flyer, so it will often be observed hopping from branch to branch in high canopies.{{Cite journal|last1=URANO|first1=EIICHIRO|last2=YAMAGISHI|first2=SATOSHI|last3=ANDRIANARIMISA|first3=ARISTIDE|last4=ANDRIATSARAFARA|first4=SOLOFO|date=2008-04-03|title=Different habitat use among three sympatric species of couas Coua cristata, C
